result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was added to the existing v1 implementation:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified files by blob hash
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores files from a commit to the working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory files, clears index
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent
